title: Plan moment derivation normalization audit
summary: Planned M54 as the stepwise transformed-noise moment derivation and normalization audit before M52.

user_inputs.text: User asked to plan a task that carefully derives transformed-noise moment conditions step by step at B=B0, including E[z1^2 z2], E[z1 z2 z3], E[z1^3 z2], E[z1^2 z2^2], E[z1^2 z2 z3], and E[z1 z2 z3 z4], and verifies whether the manuscript should switch from diag(B) normalization to unit-variance epsilon normalization, including whether a separate manuscript-wide update task is needed.

agent_actions.description: Created manuscript/tasks/M54-stepwise-moment-derivation-and-normalization-audit.md with required moment patterns, assumptions, expansion steps, Gaussian/Isserlis gate, and normalization-decision acceptance criteria.
Updated M52 to wait for M54 before the standard-DW evidence rebuild.

Updated the dashboard, task board, paper map, workplan, source packet, formal registry, and logs so M54 runs before M52 and records whether diag(B)=1 is retained or a unit-variance chart rewrite task is needed.
